name: The Adventure of Popo
developer: Jihyeon Park, Minji Kim, Byeori Moon, Jeonghyeon Kim, Jongjin Won, Eunsol Kim, Hyunseo Jeong
short_description: Join the adorable polar bear Popo on his adventure! Use shakes strategically to evade enemies and collect hints to overcome obstacles. Will Popo safely reach the polar bear village?
detailed_description:
Become Popo and go on an adventure! Escape from the constant enemies, escape from the zoo, head to the polar bear village. The beautiful Christmas background and the quirky and cute Popo appearance will give you an enjoyable experience.

[Shake]

Collect protein shakes to buy useful tools and try the skills. The tools allow you to get into places you couldn't get into, or to break things you couldn't destroy. With the skills, the gun will wake up and run at high speeds, and even attack NPCs!

[Quest]

Help citizens by receiving quests from various characters. If you fulfill their needs, you will get useful items to escape or ways to get to your destination. Follow the quests they give you one by one and reach your next destination. If you don't know what to do, try talking to the other citizens!

[Body painting]

Bring together a bunch of body paintings to decorate the four. When you wear a specific body painting, it has a hidden effect, which can help you complete the quest. If the NPC is unresponsive, try on the right body painting!
